name: privacy-policy
description: Generate a GDPR-compliant Privacy Policy template for websites, apps, or SaaS products that covers data collection, storage, user rights, and cookie usage.
input_description: Company name, website URL, types of data collected (email, payment, analytics, etc.), third-party services used (Google Analytics, Stripe, etc.), and jurisdiction.
output_description: Complete Privacy Policy in Markdown covering: data controller identity, data collected, legal basis, data use, third-party sharing, cookies, data retention, user rights (GDPR/CCPA), security measures, and contact details.
